title: selaginella vonroemeri
intro: Selaginella vonroemeri, also known as the Spikemoss or Spore Plant, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Selaginella vonroemeri is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
